productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Response Team White Sports Shoes
description: You'll love all the enhanced features adidas have packed into this Response Team Sports shoe. Branded with a Roland Garros tab on the tongue, you can wear these shoes and dream of one day playing in the legendary Paris stadium yourself!UpperSynthetic upper with adiTuff panels and high-visibility silver highlightsCentral lace-up system for a snug FitFirm heel counter to give support to your heelRaised heel tab at back heel which protects the Achilles tendon and locks the shoe in placeSoft, cushioned mesh collar and tongueMidsoleInjected EVA midsole for long-term, lightweight cushioningadiPrene under the heel and midfoot for superior cushioning at impact3D TORSION for torsional stabilityOutsoleadiWear portions in the outsole offers the ultimate in non-marking, high-wear durabilityAbrasion resistant grooves give excellent gripShoe careUse a moist cloth to remove dust and dirtDon't expose the shoe to direct sunlight or heatDon't use detergents or solvents
